description_long: This mud patch is an irregular, roughly oval-shaped clump of earth with a highly textured, lumpy surface, featuring numerous small nodules and rough protrusions. The coloration is predominantly a dark, earthy brown with subtle variations, suggesting a moist, compacted composition. One side of the patch reveals a distinct, deep impression resembling a large animal footprint, surrounded by granular, uneven mud. The edges are jagged and blend unevenly into the surrounding area, with no sharp boundary. The surface appears semi-soft and rough, with a matte finish that absorbs rather than reflects light. No visible debris, water accumulation, or additional markings are present aside from the single footprint impression.
description: A dark, lumpy mud patch with a rough, granular surface and a prominent animal footprint impression on one side.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the highly textured, bumpy surface of the mud patch with no clear impressions visible.
description_view_1: A side profile revealing the thinness of the patch and its irregular, jagged edge, with little surface detail visible.
description_view_2: A view highlighting a deep, clear animal footprint impression set into the mud, surrounded by rough, granular texture.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the patch's thin, uneven edge and polygonal surface.
attribute_location: urban park trail or roadside verge
attribute_boundary_definition: The boundaries are irregular and blend gradually into the surrounding ground, with no sharp transitions.
attribute_presence_of_footprints_or_tire: One large, clear animal footprint impression is visible.
